# Savindu Thathsara

> AI & Automation Engineer in London. Building AI-aware automation and reliable web systems with AWS, workflow automation, React, and OpenAI. Studying BSc (Hons) Computing with Artificial Intelligence at Northumbria University, London.

Over 7 years in web systems and cloud infrastructure. Currently leading IT operations and automation at Asahi Motors London — Make.com lead tracking, React + Supabase staff platform, and Autotrader + OpenAI lead replies. Open to AI automation, MLOps, and applied AI roles in the UK (on-site, hybrid, or remote).
